Headline: #36 Broadway Temporary Northbound Reroute near Ida B. Wells/Clark
ShortDescription: NB #36 Broadway buses are rerouted via Ida B. Wells, Clark, Harrison, Dearborn, then resume their normal route due to street blockage near Ida B. Wells/Clark.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

  • Northbound #36 Broadway buses are temporarily rerouted via Ida B. Wells, Clark, Harrison, Dearborn, then resume their normal route.
  • Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Ida B. Wells/Clark.
